text: We need a Cloud Engineer with AWS (EC2, S3, IAM), Terraform (IaC), and CI/CD experience. Containerization with Docker and orchestration with Kubernetes preferred. Strong Linux and networking fundamentals required.

Responsibilities include building CI/CD pipelines, managing infrastructure as code using Terraform, and deploying microservices with Docker and Kubernetes. Experience with monitoring and logging is a plus.
Must have hands-on AWS, Linux administration, Git, and scripting. Knowledge of Kubernetes, Docker, and Terraform required for scaling workloads and automating deployments.
Design and implement cloud architecture on AWS. Use Terraform for provisioning and GitHub Actions for CI/CD. Strong understanding of networking, security best practices, and cost optimization.
Work with developers to containerize applications using Docker and deploy to Kubernetes clusters. Maintain IaC modules using Terraform. Familiarity with observability tooling is desired.
Build automated infrastructure pipelines, enforce security controls, and support production deployments. Required: AWS, Terraform, CI/CD, Linux. Preferred: Kubernetes, Docker.
Cloud engineer needed for AWS operations. Must automate provisioning with Terraform and manage deployments with CI/CD. Experience with Docker is required; Kubernetes is strongly preferred.
Implement infrastructure as code and deployment automation. Strong knowledge of AWS, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, and Linux.

Strong AWS experience (EC2, S3, RDS, VPC, IAM, ELB) with Infrastructure as Code using Terraform or CloudFormation. Skilled in CI/CD pipelines, Python/Bash scripting, CloudWatch monitoring, and security best practices. Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and cost optimization tools preferred.

Expert in AWS EC2, EKS, VPC, IAM, and storage services (S3, EFS, EBS, FSx) with Terraform-based automation and CI/CD pipelines. Strong Linux/Windows administration, networking, and cloud migration experience. Knowledge of hybrid connectivity, load balancers, and troubleshooting across infrastructure layers.

Extensive AWS and GCP experience designing hybrid cloud architectures with Infrastructure as Code and CI/CD automation. Strong networking, security, compliance, monitoring, and cost optimization expertise. Skilled in scalable cloud design for high-availability environments.

AWS cloud-native development experience with Python, microservices, and CI/CD pipelines. Strong knowledge of cloud APIs, scalable architecture, monitoring, and automation. Experience troubleshooting distributed systems in production environments.

Experience operating cloud and edge infrastructure using AWS/GCP, Terraform, Ansible, and CI/CD automation. Strong knowledge of networking, load balancing, CDN integration, and observability tools. Skilled in security controls, traffic management, and high-performance systems.

Cloud-native engineer with AWS/Azure/GCP expertise, building microservices, serverless, and event-driven architectures. Strong CI/CD skills (Jenkins/GitHub/GitLab), ML platform exposure (SageMaker/Vertex AI/Azure ML), and automation using Terraform. Knowledge of containerization and secure cloud design.

Azure cloud expertise including AVD, Intune, Entra ID, Conditional Access, and Azure networking (VNet, peering, routing). Skilled in Terraform IaC, monitoring, governance, and security compliance tools. Strong hybrid cloud and M365 integration experience.

Strong AWS networking (VPC, Transit Gateway, Direct Connect), EKS, MSK, and security tooling (GuardDuty, Security Hub). Proficient in Terraform, GitLab CI/CD, Python scripting, and Kubernetes with Istio. Experience with CloudWatch, Grafana, and OpenTelemetry monitoring.

Expert in AWS/Azure cloud migration, automation, and CI/CD pipeline setup with Terraform and Kubernetes. Strong Docker, microservices, and application framework integration experience. Knowledge of security standards (OWASP, GDPR, HIPAA) and performance optimization.

AWS/Azure platform engineering experience with Terraform, Ansible, GitHub Actions, and Kubernetes. Strong cloud networking, PKI, DNS, GitOps (ArgoCD), and secrets management skills. Proficient in Linux and scripting (Bash/PowerShell/Python).

Cloud software engineering experience designing secure, scalable cloud applications with automation and CI/CD. Strong troubleshooting, monitoring, and cloud security implementation skills. Proficient in distributed systems and performance optimization.

AWS cloud security expertise with Terraform IaC, Python automation, WAF, SCPs, and secrets management. Strong Kubernetes security, compliance monitoring, and vulnerability remediation experience. Skilled in incident handling and secure SaaS cloud environments.

AWS cloud and DevOps experience with S3, CI/CD (Jenkins/GitLab/Azure DevOps), Terraform/CloudFormation, Docker, and Kubernetes. Strong monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK) and secure deployment (IL6+) experience. Proficient in Git, scripting, and Agile workflows.

Azure cloud engineering experience with Databricks, Azure PaaS, and Terraform-based IaC. Strong scripting (PowerShell/Python/Bash), monitoring, and cloud security compliance skills. Experience managing scalable Azure data platforms.

Google Cloud expertise with GCP networking, Terraform/Ansible IaC, and Docker/Kubernetes orchestration. Strong hybrid integration, FedRAMP/FISMA compliance awareness, and cloud monitoring skills. Experience automating secure GCP infrastructure deployments.

Senior AWS expertise including VPC, EC2, EKS, MSK, IAM, Route 53, Transit Gateway, Direct Connect, and load balancers. Strong Terraform, Ansible, GitLab CI/CD, Kubernetes, Python scripting, and observability (CloudWatch, Grafana, OTEL) skills. Deep knowledge of cloud security, compliance (ISO, SOC, GDPR), and hybrid networking.

GCP cloud networking expertise with VPC, Cloud Router, VPN/Interconnect, and hybrid connectivity. Strong Terraform/Ansible IaC, Kubernetes/OpenShift, Helm, Kustomize, and CI/CD automation skills. Proficient scripting in Python, Bash, or PowerShell.

Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) certified Cloud Engineer with strong OCI services expertise and Infrastructure as Code automation. Proficient in Java (Spring Boot), Python, and shell scripting with experience building microservices and RESTful APIs. Skilled in Docker, OCI Container Engine for Kubernetes (OKE), and SQL/NoSQL databases for scalable cloud-native deployments.
